name: handoff_guidance
value: Use this packet as an icing-only degradation-rate and severity source. Table 4 provides CT/CQ/C+Q/P+ linear rates at 4950 rpm, 11.7 deg, and lambda=80 g/dm^2/h; endpoint rows are simple rate*time projections. Do not merge these coefficients into the ordinary rain wetness model without a distinct ice-accretion state, accumulation time, temperature gate, and de-icing/shedding behavior.
note: The source is a 0.66 m Bell APT70-style hover rotor, not a 5-inch FPV propeller.
